name: Swiss Almond Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups Apples, peeled and thinly sliced (about 4 apples)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease and flour a 9 or 10-inch springform pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and butter; beat until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs and lemon juice; beat until well blended.
4. In a small bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt; blend together.
5. Gradually add to the egg mixture; beat at low speed until well blended.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan. Spread preserves evenly over batter.
7. Arrange apple slices on top; press gently into batter.
8. In a medium bowl, combine all topping ingredients; blend well. Spoon over apples.
9. Bake in preheated oven for 55 to 65 minutes or until apples are tender and edges are light golden brown. A toothpick inserted in the center should come out clean.
10. Let cool for 10 minutes before removing sides of pan.
11. In a small bowl, blend glaze ingredients until smooth; drizzle over cooled cake.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
